nl_query: Show all scripts where the primary evaluator has frozen the attempt, a review evaluator has been assigned, but the review attempt has not yet started, including the primary evaluator name, review evaluator name, and board code.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, p.evaluator_name AS primary_evaluator_name, r.evaluator_name AS review_evaluator_name, b.code AS board_code
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   faculty_cache p ON p.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   faculty_cache r ON r.employee_id = sa.evaluator_user_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
  AND  sa.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY'
  AND  sa.is_active = TRUE
  AND  r.evaluator_name IS NOT NULL
  AND  r.status = 'ASSIGNED'
  AND  r.is_active = TRUE
  AND  r.started_at IS NULL
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): faculty_cache.evaluator_name, faculty_cache.evaluator_name, board.code, script_assignment.evaluator_user_id, script_assignment.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
